package.name: uav_vision_png
package.description: Vision-based Proportional Navigation Guidance (PNG) for UAV interception. Subscribes to /camera_detect_result (uav_common_msg/RectMsg) to compute LOS angles purely from pixel data, then commands px4_1 to intercept the target UAV (px4_2) controlled by uav_target_sim. Target GPS position is read ONLY for statistics/logging, NOT for guidance.
